other_observers: First seen with Gary Matthews, then seen by most of the participants on the Flagler 2011/12 CBC
duration: 5 minutes and then repeatedly by different groups for the next 3 hours or so.
specific_location: SE corner of 6th St. and CR 4.
description: Tiny finch with red cap, yellow bill that extended well beyond the front of the face, significant streaking on flanks and at least smudgy streaking on undertail coverts.Behavior: Responded to pishing and playback in large AMGO flock in woodlot near the edge of a town.Call: not heard calling, but did respond to CORE playbackPlumage: winter
